title: 2026年8月 Shunbin 会议跟读
description: 第1至85句含 ElevenLabs 美式配音；第86至91句为标注跟读。
audioDisclosure: Sentences 1–85 use AI-generated pronunciation audio; sentences 86–91 have no audio.

sentences.english: We can discuss the formula and related details after we receive Logic’s proposal.
sentences.chinese: 產品配方等收到Logic的 proposal 後再談。
sentences.shadowing: We‿can‿discuss the‿formula and RELATED details after we receive Logic’s PROPOSAL. ↘

sentences.english: For the sample formula, please provide an English ingredient ratio sheet, as most of the ingredient terms are professional English terms.
sentences.chinese: 樣品配方需要提供英文成分比例表，因為成分大多是英語系的專業用語。
sentences.shadowing: For‿the‿sample formula, please PROVIDE‿an English ingredient ratio SHEET, as most of the ingredient terms are professional English TERMS. ↘

sentences.english: 2027 will be our 100th anniversary, so the upgrade schedule cannot be delayed.
sentences.chinese: 2027年是我們的 100週年，升級進度不容推遲。
sentences.shadowing: 2027 will‿be‿our‿100TH ANNIVERSARY, ↗ / so the upgrade schedule cannot be DELAYED. ↘

sentences.english: We would appreciate it if Logic could treat the new product development and formulation timeline very seriously, speed up the process, and clearly let us know how long it will take.
sentences.chinese: 請Logic嚴肅看待新品研發和調製進度，加快速度，並明確告知需要多久可以完成。
sentences.shadowing: We‿would‿appreciate‿it if Logic could treat the new product DEVELOPMENT and formulation timeline VERY seriously, speed up the PROCESS, ↗ / and clearly let us know how long it will TAKE. ↘

sentences.english: We plan to develop one new product in the next one to two years.
sentences.chinese: 我們未來每 1-2 年會開發一個新品。
sentences.shadowing: We‿plan to‿develop‿ONE new PRODUCT in the next ONE to TWO YEARS. ↘

sentences.english: If the current pace continues, we feel it is too slow, and we are concerned that Logic may not be able to keep up with our schedule.
sentences.chinese: 如果仍依照目前效率，我們認為太慢，也擔心Logic無法配合。
sentences.shadowing: If‿the‿current pace continues, ↗ / we‿FEEL it is too slow, / and we are CONCERNED that Logic may not be able to keep up with our SCHEDULE. ↘

sentences.english: Based on our previous experience working with suppliers in Thailand, the United States, and other markets, formula adjustments and samples can usually be updated within one week, and then further adjusted based on trial feedback.
sentences.chinese: 依照我們以前與泰國、美國等廠商合作的經驗，調整配方和打樣通常一週可以更新，再依照試用反饋繼續調整。
sentences.shadowing: Based‿on‿our‿previous experience working with suppliers in Thailand, ↗ / the UNITED States, and other markets, formula ADJUSTMENTS and samples can usually be updated WITHIN ONE week, / and then further adjusted based on trial FEEDBACK. ↘

sentences.english: At the moment, Logic needs about one and a half months for one adjustment, which is too slow for this project.
sentences.chinese: Logic目前一個半月才能調整，速度太慢。
sentences.shadowing: At‿the‿moment, ↗ / Logic needs‿ABOUT ONE and a half MONTHS for ONE adjustment, / which is too slow for this PROJECT. ↘

sentences.english: The cosmetics market requires us to understand future trends quickly and practically.
sentences.chinese: 化妝品市場需要快速、實際地掌握未來趨勢。
sentences.shadowing: The‿cosmetics market requires‿us to‿UNDERSTAND future trends quickly and PRACTICALLY. ↘

sentences.english: We would like Logic to regularly follow the latest beauty and fashion exhibitions in markets such as Tokyo and Europe, keep track of market trends, hot topics, information, and regulations, and then provide proposals for next year.
sentences.chinese: 請Logic經常關注日本東京、歐洲等市場最新的美容展、時尚展，掌握最新的市場趨勢、話題、資訊和法規，並提供明年的提案。
sentences.shadowing: We‿would‿like Logic to‿regularly follow the latest beauty and FASHION exhibitions in markets such as Tokyo and EUROPE, keep track of market trends, HOT topics, information, and regulations, ↗ / and then provide proposals for next YEAR. ↘

sentences.english: Could you please confirm whether Logic can meet the above requirements?
sentences.chinese: 請確認Logic是否可以做到上述要求。
sentences.shadowing: Could‿you‿please confirm whether LOGIC can‿meet the above REQUIREMENTS? ↗

sentences.english: Unless there is a major reason, meeting times should not be changed or postponed.
sentences.chinese: 除非有重大因素，不可以更改會議時間或延後會議時間。
sentences.shadowing: Unless there‿is‿a major reason, ↗ / meeting TIMES should‿not be changed or POSTPONED. ↘

sentences.english: Any delay in the schedule, target dates, or presentation timing will affect our internal workflow.
sentences.chinese: 日程表、各項目標日程、簡報提示時間如果拖延，都會影響我們的工作節拍。
sentences.shadowing: Any delay‿in‿the‿schedule, target dates, or PRESENTATION timing will affect our internal WORKFLOW. ↘

sentences.english: Our 100th anniversary will not wait for us.
sentences.chinese: 我們的 100週年是不等人的。
sentences.shadowing: Our‿100TH‿anniversary will‿not WAIT for us. ↘

sentences.english: Samples, packaging materials, and related items can be sent to Taiwan by air freight so that we can personally evaluate them.
sentences.chinese: 樣品、包材等都可以用空運方式寄到台灣，讓我們實際體驗。
sentences.shadowing: Samples, packaging MATERIALS, and‿related‿items can‿be sent to TAIWAN by air freight so that we can personally EVALUATE them. ↘

sentences.english: We would appreciate it if Logic could confirm whether formula adjustments can be completed within one week and whether the samples can then be arranged for air shipment to Taiwan.
sentences.chinese: 請Logic確認配方調整是否可以在一週內調製完成後，寄到台灣。
sentences.shadowing: We‿would‿appreciate‿it if Logic could confirm whether FORMULA adjustments can be completed within ONE week and whether the SAMPLES can then be arranged for air shipment to TAIWAN. ↘

sentences.english: Logic has cosmetics manufacturing and cosmetics sales/manufacturing licenses.
sentences.chinese: Logic持有化妝品製造業與化妝品販賣製造業許可。
sentences.shadowing: Logic has‿cosmetics manufacturing‿and‿COSMETICS sales/manufacturing LICENSES. ↘

sentences.english: Could you please confirm the validity period of these licenses and when Logic plans to apply for renewal?
sentences.chinese: 請確認這些許可證的有效期，以及Logic預計何時申請展延。
sentences.shadowing: Could‿you‿please confirm the‿VALIDITY period of these LICENSES and when Logic plans to apply for RENEWAL? ↗

sentences.english: For Logic’s partner, the ISO certificate previously shared will expire in September 2027.
sentences.chinese: Logic合作廠商先前提供的ISO證書將於2027年9月到期。
sentences.shadowing: For‿Logic’s partner, ↗ / the‿ISO certificate PREVIOUSLY shared will‿expire in SEPTEMBER 2027. ↘

sentences.english: Could you please let us know when it will be renewed?
sentences.chinese: 請問預計何時辦理展延？
sentences.shadowing: Could‿you‿please let‿us KNOW when it will be RENEWED? ↗

sentences.english: We are concerned about the possibility that the certificate may expire before production is completed, or after production but before renewal is finished.
sentences.chinese: 我們擔心在生產完成前，或產品已完成但展延尚未完成時，證書就已過期。
sentences.shadowing: We‿are‿concerned‿about the POSSIBILITY that the certificate may expire before PRODUCTION is completed, ↗ / or after production but before renewal is FINISHED. ↘

sentences.english: For the company under Logic that acts as the seller, what licenses does it hold?
sentences.chinese: Logic旗下作為發賣元的公司，持有什麼證件呢？
sentences.shadowing: For‿the‿company‿under Logic that ACTS as the seller, what licenses does it HOLD? ↗

sentences.english: Does it also hold the two licenses mentioned above?
sentences.chinese: 是否也持有上述兩個證件？
sentences.shadowing: Does‿it‿also hold the‿TWO licenses mentioned ABOVE? ↗

sentences.english: The cost of purchasing raw materials needed for sample adjustments should be covered by Logic, and samples should not be charged.
sentences.chinese: 調整樣品所需採購原料，應由Logic負擔費用，樣品不能收費。
sentences.shadowing: The‿cost‿of‿purchasing raw MATERIALS needed for sample ADJUSTMENTS should be covered by Logic, and samples should not be CHARGED. ↘

sentences.english: This is how we currently work with other suppliers.
sentences.chinese: 我們目前與各廠商的合作都是如此。
sentences.shadowing: This‿is‿how we‿CURRENTLY work with other SUPPLIERS. ↘

sentences.english: If product information or documents need to be updated due to Japanese regulations or the regulations of the export country, these costs should also be covered by Logic.
sentences.chinese: 因應日本或出口國法規，需要更新商品相關資訊和文件時，這些費用都要由Logic負擔。
sentences.shadowing: If‿product‿information‿or documents NEED to be updated due to Japanese regulations or the REGULATIONS of the EXPORT country, ↗ / these costs should also be covered by LOGIC. ↘

sentences.english: If the product cannot be exported due to qualification issues with Logic or its partner factory, Logic will need to find a qualified factory to produce the goods again.
sentences.chinese: 如果因Logic和 partner factory 的資質問題，導致無法出口商品，Logic需要找到符合要求的廠商重新生產商品。
sentences.shadowing: If‿the‿product cannot be‿exported due to QUALIFICATION issues with Logic or its PARTNER factory, ↗ / Logic will NEED to find a qualified factory to produce the GOODS again. ↘

sentences.english: Any resulting production loss, product return costs, customs declaration, customs clearance, storage, and related expenses should be borne by Logic.
sentences.chinese: 因此損失的生產費用、商品退回費用、報關、清關、倉儲等費用，都需要由Logic承擔。
sentences.shadowing: Any resulting production loss, PRODUCT return costs, customs declaration, customs CLEARANCE, storage, and‿related‿expenses should‿be borne by LOGIC. ↘

sentences.english: In addition to the formula, container work should also begin.
sentences.chinese: 除了配方之外，容器部分也要著手執行。
sentences.shadowing: In‿addition to‿the‿formula, ↗ / CONTAINER work should also BEGIN. ↘

sentences.english: If we wait until the formula is finalized before starting, the overall schedule will be too slow.
sentences.chinese: 如果等到配方完成才開始，進度會太慢。
sentences.shadowing: If‿we‿wait‿until the formula is finalized before STARTING, ↗ / the overall schedule will be too SLOW. ↘

sentences.english: The formula and container options can be recommended in parallel, discussed together, and adjusted on a rolling basis to improve efficiency.
sentences.chinese: 配方和容器可以同步推薦、一起討論修正，採用聯動式/滾動式調整，效率會比較快。
sentences.shadowing: The‿formula‿and‿container options can be RECOMMENDED in parallel, DISCUSSED together, and adjusted on a rolling basis to improve EFFICIENCY. ↘

sentences.english: If container selection does not start early and only begins after the formula is confirmed, it will delay Shunbin’s design schedule.
sentences.chinese: 如果容器沒有這麼早開始選擇，而是等到配方確認再開始，會拖延到Shunbin的設計案進度。
sentences.shadowing: If‿container selection does not START‿early‿and only BEGINS after the formula is confirmed, ↗ / it will delay Shunbin’s design SCHEDULE. ↘

sentences.english: We would like both Logic and Shunbin to refer to how bestselling products in the Japanese market communicate their value, especially how they address consumer pain points, rather than simply saying “moisturizing.”
sentences.chinese: 請Logic和Shunbin都參考日本市場上熱賣品的商品表達方式，了解它們如何打動消費者痛點，而不是只簡單寫保濕。
sentences.shadowing: We‿would‿like both Logic‿and Shunbin to refer to how BESTSELLING products in the Japanese MARKET communicate their value, especially how they address CONSUMER pain points, ↗ / rather than simply saying “MOISTURIZING.” ↘

sentences.english: The wording needs to comply with regulations while still conveying a sense of effectiveness and appealing to consumers.
sentences.chinese: 用詞需要符合法規，同時傳達功效感並吸引消費者。
sentences.shadowing: The‿wording needs to‿COMPLY with‿regulations while still CONVEYING a sense of effectiveness and appealing to CONSUMERS. ↘

sentences.english: For example, expressions such as “jointly developed with a pharmaceutical company,” “high-concentration formula,” “nighttime penetration,” and “advanced regenerative medicine” can be considered.
sentences.chinese: 例如可考慮「與製藥公司共同開發」、「高濃度配方」、「夜間滲透」與「先進再生醫療」等表達。
sentences.shadowing: For‿example, expressions such‿as “jointly developed with‿a PHARMACEUTICAL company,” “HIGH-concentration formula,” “nighttime penetration,” and “advanced regenerative medicine” can be CONSIDERED. ↘

sentences.english: If the topic of a contract comes up, our response should be that signing a contract can only be discussed after the proposal is successful.
sentences.chinese: 如果談到合約，回覆是提案成功後才可能簽約。
sentences.shadowing: If‿the‿topic‿of a contract COMES up, ↗ / our response should be that SIGNING a contract can only be discussed after the proposal is SUCCESSFUL. ↘

sentences.english: Logic previously mentioned nanotechnology in its presentation.
sentences.chinese: Logic先前在簡報中提到奈米技術。
sentences.shadowing: Logic previously mentioned nanotechnology‿in‿its PRESENTATION. ↘

sentences.english: Please confirm whether this technology can be applied to the development of this product, and if so, how it can be used.
sentences.chinese: 請確認這項技術是否可應用於本產品研發，若可以，應如何應用。
sentences.shadowing: Please CONFIRM whether this‿technology can‿be‿applied to the DEVELOPMENT of this product, and if so, how it can be USED. ↘

sentences.english: Brand name: If there is no better option, we can tentatively use HAKUYU or LUMINT as the direction.
sentences.chinese: 品牌名稱：如果沒有更好的選擇，暫以 HAKUYU 或 LUMINT 為方向。
sentences.shadowing: Brand name: If‿there‿is‿NO better option, we can TENTATIVELY use HAKUYU or LUMINT as the DIRECTION. ↘

sentences.english: Logo: To be designed by Shunbin.
sentences.chinese: Logo：由Shunbin設計。
sentences.shadowing: Logo: To‿be designed by SHUNBIN. ↘

sentences.english: Character: To be confirmed.
sentences.chinese: Character：待訂。
sentences.shadowing: Character: To‿be CONFIRMED. ↘

sentences.english: Tagline: To be developed by Shunbin.
sentences.chinese: Tagline：由Shunbin發想。
sentences.shadowing: Tagline: To‿be developed by SHUNBIN. ↘

sentences.english: Package: To be designed by Shunbin.
sentences.chinese: Package：由Shunbin設計。
sentences.shadowing: Package: To‿be designed by SHUNBIN. ↘

sentences.english: Color: White and green.
sentences.chinese: Color：白和綠。
sentences.shadowing: Color: White‿and‿GREEN. ↘

sentences.english: Jingle / Music: Use the White Flower Oil Princess commercial as the base and optimize it further.
sentences.chinese: Jingle / Music：以白花油公主廣告為基礎，優化調整。
sentences.shadowing: Jingle / Music: Use the‿White Flower‿Oil Princess COMMERCIAL‿as the base and optimize it FURTHER. ↘

sentences.english: Smell: Keep the familiar White Flower Oil scent, but make it more elegant.
sentences.chinese: Smell：保留白花油似曾相識的味道，並使其更加優雅。
sentences.shadowing: Smell: Keep the‿familiar White Flower‿OIL scent, ↗ / but make‿it more ELEGANT. ↘

sentences.english: Domain: Use the English brand or series name, plus .com, .co.jp, or .jp.
sentences.chinese: Domain：品牌或系列名稱英文，加上 .com、.co.jp 或 .jp。
sentences.shadowing: Domain: Use the‿English brand‿or‿series NAME, plus .com, .co.jp, or .JP. ↘

sentences.english: Before purchasing, scenario 1: Existing customers and younger office workers around the age of 30 may not have truly tried our product yet.
sentences.chinese: 購買前情境 1：既有舊顧客以及 30 歲左右的上班族等年輕一代，還沒有真正用過我們商品。
sentences.shadowing: Before purchasing, scenario 1: Existing CUSTOMERS‿and‿younger‿office workers around the AGE of 30 may not have truly tried our product YET. ↘

sentences.english: They see information through TV commercials or social media, try the upgraded product in a physical store or during a short-term brand event, feel that the scent is good, and then search online.
sentences.chinese: 他們通過電視廣告或社群看到相關資訊，在實體店面或品牌短期活動中試用新升級版商品，覺得味道不錯，於是上網搜尋資料；
sentences.shadowing: They‿see‿information through TV commercials‿or social MEDIA, try the upgraded product in a physical STORE or during a short-TERM brand event, feel that the scent is good, ↗ / and then search ONLINE. ↘

sentences.english: After seeing positive word of mouth, they decide to buy it or add it to their shopping list.
sentences.chinese: 看到口碑不錯後，決定購買或加入準備購買清單。
sentences.shadowing: After seeing positive WORD‿of‿mouth, ↗ / they‿decide to BUY it or add it to their shopping LIST. ↘

sentences.english: Before purchasing, scenario 2: Consumers may recently have been bitten by mosquitoes, had headaches, felt low on energy, wanted to cool down in hot weather, wanted stress relief, or simply felt uncomfortable.
sentences.chinese: 購買前情境2：消費者最近可能常被蚊子叮、頭痛、精神不佳、想在炎熱天氣降溫、想舒緩壓力，或只是感到不舒服。
sentences.shadowing: Before purchasing, scenario 2: Consumers may recently have‿been bitten by mosquitoes, had HEADACHES, felt LOW‿on‿energy, wanted to cool down in hot WEATHER, wanted stress relief, or simply felt UNCOMFORTABLE. ↘

sentences.english: They search keywords online to see what other people are using.
sentences.chinese: 他們會上網搜尋關鍵字，看看其他人都在使用什麼。
sentences.shadowing: They‿search keywords‿online to‿SEE what other people are USING. ↘

sentences.english: After seeing many people recommend White Flower Oil, they click into the posts, learn that it is herbal and gentle, and find that it is available both online and offline with good reviews.
sentences.chinese: 看到許多人推薦白花油後，他們點進貼文，了解產品為草本且溫和，並發現線上線下都能購買，評價也很好。
sentences.shadowing: After seeing many people recommend White FLOWER‿Oil, ↗ / they‿click‿into the posts, learn that it is HERBAL and gentle, and FIND that it is available both online and offline with good REVIEWS. ↘

sentences.english: Before purchasing, scenario 3: Social media hot topics may push consumers to learn more.
sentences.chinese: 購買前情境3：社群媒體熱門話題可能推動消費者進一步了解。
sentences.shadowing: Before purchasing, scenario 3: Social media hot TOPICS may push consumers to‿learn MORE. ↘

sentences.english: For example, people may be discussing whether there is a limited-edition White Flower Oil at Kansai Airport in Japan, or whether it is sold in Taiwan, so consumers go to Trend, Facebook, and other social platforms for more information.
sentences.chinese: 例如大家可能在討論日本關西機場是否有限定版白花油，或台灣是否有販售，因此消費者會到Trend、Facebook等社群平台查找更多資訊。
sentences.shadowing: For‿example, people may be discussing whether there‿is‿a limited-edition White FLOWER Oil at Kansai Airport in JAPAN, or whether it is sold in Taiwan, ↗ / so consumers GO to Trend, Facebook, and other social platforms for more INFORMATION. ↘

sentences.english: At the time of purchase, scenario 1: In a physical store, consumers see an opened tester and first feel that the packaging looks good.
sentences.chinese: 購買時情境 1：在實體店看到拆開的試用品，第一眼覺得包裝好看；
sentences.shadowing: At‿the‿time‿of purchase, ↗ / scenario 1: In a PHYSICAL store, consumers SEE an opened tester and first feel that the packaging looks GOOD. ↘

sentences.english: After trying it, they feel it is more convenient than before, not sticky, absorbs well, and smells good.
sentences.chinese: 使用後感覺比以前方便，不黏膩、好吸收、味道很好。
sentences.shadowing: After trying‿it, ↗ / they‿feel‿it is MORE CONVENIENT than before, not sticky, absorbs well, and smells GOOD. ↘

sentences.english: The shelf also shows eye-catching keywords such as “made in Japan,” “premium ingredients,” “relief for brain fatigue,” “alcohol-free,” “mindfulness,” and “five-sense experience,” together with “doctor recommended” claims and scientific data.
sentences.chinese: 陳列架上有吸引眼球的關鍵字，例如“日本製造”、“頂級原料”、“療癒腦疲勞”、“無酒精”、“mindfulness”、“五感體驗”等，旁邊還有“博士推薦”和科學數據。
sentences.shadowing: The‿shelf‿also shows‿eye-catching keywords such as “made in Japan,” “PREMIUM ingredients,” “relief for BRAIN fatigue,” “alcohol-free,” “mindfulness,” and “five-SENSE experience,” together with “doctor recommended” claims and scientific DATA. ↘

sentences.english: Even if consumers feel the price is a little higher, they believe it is worth the price and works better, so they decide to buy it.
sentences.chinese: 消費者雖覺得貴一點，但認為物有所值、效果更好，因此購買。
sentences.shadowing: Even‿if‿consumers feel the‿PRICE is a little higher, ↗ / they believe it is WORTH the price and works better, / so they decide to BUY it. ↘

sentences.english: At the time of purchase, scenario 2: On the online shopping page, consumers see a detailed but easy-to-understand introduction, expert explanations, and simple diagrams showing when to use the product.
sentences.chinese: 購買時情境2：消費者在網路購物頁面看到內容詳細但易懂的介紹、專家說明，以及使用時機的簡單圖示。
sentences.shadowing: At‿the‿time‿of purchase, ↗ / scenario 2: On the online shopping PAGE, consumers see a DETAILED but easy-to-understand introduction, EXPERT explanations, and simple diagrams showing when to use the PRODUCT. ↘

sentences.english: They see that the product has many uses, the visuals are clear, it is convenient to use, and the design looks good.
sentences.chinese: 他們發現產品用途多、圖示清楚、使用方便，而且設計好看。
sentences.shadowing: They‿see that‿the‿product has MANY uses, the visuals are CLEAR, it is convenient to use, and the design looks GOOD. ↘

sentences.english: With influencer recommendations or celebrity usage, they decide to purchase.
sentences.chinese: 再加上網紅推薦或名人使用，他們因此決定購買。
sentences.shadowing: With‿influencer recommendations‿or‿celebrity USAGE, ↗ / they decide to PURCHASE. ↘

sentences.english: At the time of purchase, scenario 3: When purchasing by phone or through mail-order sales, the phone representative explains the product clearly and kindly.
sentences.chinese: 購買時情境3：透過電話或通訊販售購買時，接線人員會清楚而親切地說明產品。
sentences.shadowing: At‿the‿time‿of purchase, ↗ / scenario 3: When purchasing by PHONE or THROUGH mail-order sales, the phone representative explains the product clearly and KINDLY. ↘

sentences.english: The examples are close to everyday life, making the product feel practical and widely usable.
sentences.chinese: 舉例貼近日常生活，讓人覺得產品實用且用途廣泛。
sentences.shadowing: The‿examples‿are‿close to everyday life, ↗ / MAKING the product feel practical and widely USABLE. ↘

sentences.english: Shipping and payment options are also varied and convenient.
sentences.chinese: 郵寄與付款方式也很多元、方便。
sentences.shadowing: Shipping‿and‿payment‿OPTIONS are also varied and CONVENIENT. ↘

sentences.english: After hearing this, consumers feel reassured and decide to buy.
sentences.chinese: 聽完後，消費者感到安心，因此決定購買。
sentences.shadowing: After hearing this, ↗ / consumers feel REASSURED‿and‿decide to‿BUY. ↘

sentences.english: At the time of purchase, scenario 4: Consumers may ask friends or family to bring it back from Japan, or ask a purchasing agent to buy it for them.
sentences.chinese: 購買時情境 4：託親友從日本買回來，或託代購業者買回來。
sentences.shadowing: At‿the‿time‿of purchase, ↗ / scenario 4: CONSUMERS may ask friends or family to BRING it back from JAPAN, / or ask a purchasing agent to BUY it for them. ↘

sentences.english: After purchase, scenario 1: The product feels practical and fits modern needs.
sentences.chinese: 購買後情境1：產品實用，也符合現代需求。
sentences.shadowing: After purchase, scenario 1: The‿product FEELS practical‿and‿fits modern NEEDS. ↘

sentences.english: It truly helps reduce stress or improve skin-related discomfort, and the scent feels reassuring.
sentences.chinese: 它確實有助於減輕壓力或改善皮膚不適，而且香味令人安心。
sentences.shadowing: It‿truly helps reduce stress‿or‿improve SKIN-related discomfort, and the scent feels REASSURING. ↘

sentences.english: It is easy to carry, and having it nearby gives consumers a sense of comfort.
sentences.chinese: 產品容易攜帶，放在身邊會讓消費者感到安心。
sentences.shadowing: It‿is‿easy to‿carry, and having it NEARBY gives consumers a sense of COMFORT. ↘

sentences.english: People around them are also using it, and celebrities or idols may use it too, so consumers feel they made a smart choice and bought the right product.
sentences.chinese: 周圍的人也在使用，名人或偶像也可能在用，因此消費者會覺得自己眼光很好，買對了產品。
sentences.shadowing: People‿around them‿are‿also using it, and celebrities or IDOLS may use it TOO, ↗ / so consumers feel they made a SMART choice and bought the right PRODUCT. ↘

sentences.english: Maintain ongoing social media buzz.
sentences.chinese: 持續在社群上有討論熱度；
sentences.shadowing: Maintain‿ongoing social media BUZZ. ↘

sentences.english: Launch limited editions every one to two years.
sentences.chinese: 每 1-2 年品牌有限定品發表；
sentences.shadowing: Launch limited‿editions‿every‿ONE to TWO YEARS. ↘

sentences.english: Update the ingredients of classic products from time to time based on consumer needs, and create new market topics again.
sentences.chinese: 原有經典商品因應需求不定期更新成分，再創造市場新話題。
sentences.shadowing: Update the‿ingredients‿of‿classic PRODUCTS from time to time BASED on consumer needs, and create new market TOPICS again. ↘

sentences.english: External goal: White Flower Oil, Shunbin, and Logic can grow together and achieve successful business results.
sentences.chinese: 外部：白花油公司、Shunbin、Logic三方一起賺大錢。
sentences.shadowing: External goal: White Flower‿Oil, Shunbin, and‿LOGIC can‿grow together and achieve successful business RESULTS. ↘

sentences.english: Internal goal: Lead the company team so that everyone can grow together and achieve better results.
sentences.chinese: 內部：帶領企業員工大家一起賺大錢。
sentences.shadowing: Internal goal: Lead the‿company team so that‿EVERYONE can‿grow together and achieve better RESULTS. ↘

sentences.english: For presentation dates and meeting dates, we feel it would not be acceptable to postpone, reschedule, or miss the agreed timing.
sentences.chinese: 簡報和會議訂定的日期，如果延期、改期或未按時提示，我們都覺得不可以。
sentences.shadowing: For‿presentation dates‿and‿meeting DATES, we feel it would NOT be acceptable to postpone, reschedule, or miss the agreed TIMING. ↘

sentences.english: We would appreciate it if Shunbin could follow the agreed timeline.
sentences.chinese: 請Shunbin務必遵循承諾的時間點。
sentences.shadowing: We‿would‿appreciate‿it if SHUNBIN could follow the agreed TIMELINE. ↘

sentences.english: Next year is our 100th anniversary, so we hope the following design work can move quickly.
sentences.chinese: 明年是 100週年，我們希望緊接著的設計案效率要快。
sentences.shadowing: Next year‿is‿our‿100TH anniversary, ↗ / so we HOPE the following design work can move QUICKLY. ↘

sentences.english: The current speed and progress do not match the timeline Shunbin previously presented, and we feel it is too slow.
sentences.chinese: 目前速度和進度，與Shunbin提示的 timeline 不一致，太慢了。
sentences.shadowing: The‿current speed‿and‿progress do NOT match the timeline SHUNBIN previously presented, ↗ / and we feel it is too SLOW. ↘

sentences.english: We hope the pace can speed up from here, otherwise it may delay our 100th anniversary plans.
sentences.chinese: 希望後面加速，否則會延誤我們的 100週年。
sentences.shadowing: We‿hope the‿pace can‿speed up from HERE, ↗ / otherwise it may delay our 100TH anniversary PLANS. ↘

sentences.english: The brand upgrade design and website design should move forward at the same time, and several concept directions should be provided for review and selection.
sentences.chinese: 品牌升級的設計案和網站的設計案要同步推進，並且要提供多個概念方向供參考和選擇。
sentences.shadowing: The‿brand‿upgrade design‿and website DESIGN should move forward at the SAME time, and several concept directions should be provided for review and SELECTION. ↘

sentences.english: If, after Tuesday’s meeting with Logic, we feel that Logic does not meet our requirements, Shunbin will need to quickly find a new supplier based on its previous commitment.
sentences.chinese: 如果禮拜二與Logic會議後，覺得Logic不符合我們的要求，Shunbin需要根據之前承諾，快速找到新的廠商。
sentences.shadowing: If, after Tuesday’s meeting with‿Logic, we‿feel that‿LOGIC does not meet our REQUIREMENTS, Shunbin will need to quickly FIND a new supplier based on its previous COMMITMENT. ↘

sentences.english: This will also allow Shunbin’s design work to continue according to schedule.
sentences.chinese: 這樣Shunbin的設計進度也才能按進程推進。
sentences.shadowing: This‿will‿also‿allow Shunbin’s design WORK to continue according to SCHEDULE. ↘

sentences.english: If Shunbin raises various restrictions related to CBD, our response should be: this is their responsibility and obligation, and the product must be developed in a legally compliant way.
sentences.chinese: 如果Shunbin提出 CBD 的各種限定，我們要回覆：這是他們的責任和義務，需要合法合規地研發產品。
sentences.shadowing: If‿Shunbin raises various restrictions RELATED to‿CBD, ↗ / our‿response should be: this is their RESPONSIBILITY and obligation, and the product MUST be developed in a legally compliant WAY. ↘

sentences.english: What we need is the final result: a product that can be sold on the market and used with confidence.
sentences.chinese: 我們要的是結果，也就是可以市售並且安心的產品。
sentences.shadowing: What we‿need‿is‿the FINAL result: a PRODUCT that can be sold on the market and used with CONFIDENCE. ↘

sentences.english: As shown in the two products we mentioned, both the product packaging and the online sales copy make strong use of wording related to medical grade, and they use it in a very flexible way.
sentences.chinese: 如我們提示的兩款商品，無論是商品本身的包裝，或是商品販售的網頁文宣，都充分應用了代表 medical grade 的相關文字，而且運用得非常靈活。
sentences.shadowing: As‿shown‿in‿the TWO products we mentioned, both the product PACKAGING and the online sales copy MAKE strong use of wording RELATED to medical grade, ↗ / and they use it in a very flexible WAY. ↘

sentences.english: We do not need to use “medical grade” directly.
sentences.chinese: 我們不一定要直接使用「醫療級」這個說法。
sentences.shadowing: We‿do not need to‿USE “medical grade” DIRECTLY. ↘

sentences.english: We can use more flexible and suitable expressions, such as “jointly developed with a pharmaceutical company” or “advanced regenerative medicine”, to communicate the medical-grade concept.
sentences.chinese: 我們可以使用更靈活、更合適的表達，例如「與製藥公司共同開發」或「先進再生醫療」，以傳達醫療級概念。
sentences.shadowing: We‿can‿use more flexible‿and suitable EXPRESSIONS, such as “jointly developed with a PHARMACEUTICAL company” or “advanced regenerative medicine”, to communicate the medical-grade CONCEPT. ↘

sentences.english: If a certain ingredient is pharmaceutical grade, we can also describe it as medical grade.
sentences.chinese: 如果某個成分是醫藥等級，也可以寫 medical grade。
sentences.shadowing: If‿a certain‿ingredient‿is pharmaceutical GRADE, ↗ / we can also describe it as medical GRADE. ↘

sentences.english: For example, alcohol can be classified into industrial, pharmaceutical, and food grades.
sentences.chinese: 例如酒精也有分工業、藥品、食品等級。
sentences.shadowing: For‿example, alcohol can‿be CLASSIFIED‿into industrial, pharmaceutical, and food GRADES. ↘
